title: LEGO NINJAGO Rontu the Master Dragon Toy - Posable Dragon Figure with Stud Shooters - incl. Lloyd, Sora & Wyldfyre Minifigures - Gift for 7+ Year Old Boys - 71842
features: LEGO NINJAGO dragon toy for kids – Rontu the Master Dragon building toy for 7+ year old boys and girls lets kids recreate scenes from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show
Highly posable dragon figure – This large buildable dragon toy features a movable tail, legs, wings, head and jaw, two minifigure seats on its back, and a stud shooter under each wing
Mini shrine – This LEGO NINJAGO set includes a small brick-built shrine guarded by Zarkt, containing a secret message that Lloyd can decode using his translucent reveal blade accessory
4 NINJAGO minifigures – This building set comes with ninja warriors Sora, Wyldfyre, Lloyd and the villainous Zarkt with ninja toy weapon accessories for kids to play out good vs. evil battles
NINJAGO gift idea for kids – This LEGO set offers a fun build-and-play experience and makes a great birthday gift for 7+ year old boys and girls who love ninja toys
A fun way to build – The LEGO Builder app offers an intuitive building experience, allowing kids to save sets, track progress, and zoom in or rotate models in 3D as they build
A universe of LEGO NINJAGO sets – The wide range of ninja building toys (sold separately) lets kids dive into a fantasy world of imaginative adventures with their ninja heroes
description: From the manufacturer LEGO NINJAGO Rontu the Master Dragon playset Delight ninja fans with this action-packed ninja playset featuring a large dragon toy and 4 NINJAGO minifigures. Enjoy ninja adventures in the sky! Boys and girls have all they need to recreate amazing aerial scenes from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show. LEGO NINJAGO Rontu the Master Dragon Posable dragon figure Move the tail, legs, wings, head and jaw. Take aim and fire! Dragon toy has a stud shooter in each wing. 4 NINJAGO minifigures Sora, Wyldfyre, Lloyd and the villain Zarkt. Enter a new world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. More LEGO NINJAGO sets to collect Other LEGO NINJAGO sets (sold separately) let kids enjoy even bigger ninja adventures with their heroes.
